title: CimkNo Music
description: Music I made added into Minecraft!
body:
Lets say, you're really bored, and minecraft music discs arent enough. WELL WELCOME TO MY MOD >:D
This mod adds music that I made. Usually not the best music, but for me its pretty cool :D



Im also going to work on many other songs, and I hope this mod is gonna also motivate me to make more music. And I hope this mod is gonna be fun to play, and probably going to make a discord server too!

Current music discs added:
True future
Pirate Bay OST (from forsaken)
(Coming soon...)




## CREDITS:
MCreator by Pylo, for the program I used to make this mod!
Lymphh for the Forsaken OST!
